title: Bird CMS Article Frontmatter
description: Schema for the .meta.yaml file (or embedded YAML frontmatter) accompanying each Markdown article. Drives Schema.org generation, pillar-cluster interlinking, and admin UI.

title.description: Article HTML title and Schema.org headline. Recommended ≤70 chars for SERP.

description.description: Meta description and Schema.org description. 120–160 chars optimal for SERP.

primary.description: Primary keyword for pillar-cluster interlinking. Articles with the same primary cluster together.

secondary.description: Secondary keywords. Used for related-article scoring.

category.description: Category slug. Usually derived from the article path; explicit override allowed here.

hero_image.description: Path to hero image relative to public/. Engine auto-resolves WebP variants. Required for Open Graph image.

hero_image_alt.description: Alt text for the hero image (accessibility + SEO).

author.description: Author name. Maps to Schema.org Person.

published_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp. Maps to Schema.org datePublished.

schema_type.description: Drives which Schema.org markup is emitted. Defaults to 'article' if omitted.

canonical.description: Override canonical URL. Default is computed from site_url + path.

robots.description: Override robots meta. Default 'index,follow' for published articles.

faq.description: FAQ entries. Triggers Schema.org FAQPage emission.

howto_steps.description: HowTo steps. Triggers Schema.org HowTo emission.

review.description: Review payload. Triggers Schema.org Review + AggregateRating.

product.description: Product payload. Triggers Schema.org SoftwareApplication / Product + Offer.

draft.description: If true, article is excluded from sitemap/feeds and renders only with a valid HMAC preview token.

reading_time.description: Override reading-time minutes. Default is computed from word count.
